name: https

c_bindings.name: clyth_http
c_bindings.backend: Clyth libuv/llhttp server binding with TLS-ready configuration surface
c_bindings.license: MIT wrapper; OpenSSL backend is Apache-2.0 when enabled

notes: Canonical 0.5.0 server API. ServerConfiguration(port, router) starts plain HTTP; ServerConfiguration(port, router, certificate, key) reserves the same surface for TLS. TLS is configuration, not a separate server model.
